name: Pandemic
description: A Vladof MIRV grenade built to spread corrosive damage through packed groups. It is especially effective against softer armoured enemies, where a single throw can infect a crowd and let the lingering damage finish off weaker targets.
notes:
Each time one of its child grenades passes the corrosive effect to a fresh target, the game plays a rocket launcher firing sound.

Pandemic uses fixed corrosive parts, including the Exterminator-style area payload. Storm Front and Fire Bee use that same payload, but each behaves differently because their balance values are separate.

special.description: Always corrosive. On detonation it releases a corrosive cloud, then spawns three homing child grenades. Those children stick to enemies, deal damage over time, and then move on to fresh targets until they expire.
special.title: Spread the sickness.
